name: Real Property Subdivided for Sale Safe Harbor

eligibility.description: Taxpayer must have held the property for 5 years (unless inherited), made no substantial improvements that enhance value, and not previously held the tract as a dealer.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows non-C corporation taxpayers to subdivide a tract of land for sale without being classified as a 'dealer,' preserving capital gain treatment on the first 5 lots sold.
